> A professional mixing and mastering engineer offering audio post-production services. The business revolves around crafting polished, radio-ready sound for musicians and artists, combining technical expertise with a deep passion for music. The brand identity likely carries a creative, sonic, and professional vibe rooted in the music production world.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About סמי טריגוב טכנאי מיקס ומאסטרינג
A professional mixing and mastering engineer offering audio post-production services. The business revolves around crafting polished, radio-ready sound for musicians and artists, combining technical expertise with a deep passion for music. The brand identity likely carries a creative, sonic, and professional vibe rooted in the music production world.

## Services/Products
- מיקס
- מאסטרינג

## Target Audience
- מוזיקאים עצמאיים
- חברות תקליטים
- די ג'ייז מתחילים

## Industry
הפקה מוזיקלית ואודיו
